sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_example (id UInt32, resolution UInt8);
UPDATE h3_example SET resolution = 12 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, h3EdgeLengthKm(resolution) AS edgeLengthKm FROM h3_example;
SELECT id, resolution, h3EdgeLengthKm(resolution) * 2 AS doubleEdgeLengthKm FROM h3_example WHERE resolution > 5;
